A1K/A90/A70/C80/FAS90/FAS70", "wontfix": false}], "kb_impact": "Successful exploitation of this vulnerability could lead to disclosure of sensitive information, addition or modification of data, or Denial of Service (DoS).

E-Series SANtricity OS Controller Software 11.x:
Affected only in version 11.80.1 when ssh login is enabled.

ONTAP Select Deploy administration utility:
Affected only in version 9.14.1.

ONTAP 9 (formerly Clustered Data ONTAP):
Theoretically exploitable in versions 9.11.1 and higher - the exploit has not been demonstrated on FreeBSD.
The default values for LoginGraceTime and MaxStartups are 30 seconds and 10:30:60 which reduce the chance of successful exploit.", "kb_internal_notes": [{"burt": "", "jira": "PSIRT-10235", "product": "AFF Baseboard Management Controller (BMC) - fixed_versions: Active IQ Unified Manager for VMware vSphere: {'link': 'https://mysupport.netapp.com/site/products/all/details/activeiq-unified-manager/downloads-tab/download/62791/9.14', 'cves': []}
mitigations:
E-Series SANtricity OS Controller Software 11.x:
Disable SSH login if enabled.

ONTAP 9 (formerly Clustered Data ONTAP):
Upgrading to a fixed version of ONTAP is recommended.

title: CVE-2024-6387 OpenSSH Vulnerability in NetApp Products
